title: Netherite Blocks from Diamonds
description: OP mod that allows you to upgrade diamond blocks into netherite, for neoforge, fabric and forge.
body:
This mod allows you to use a smithing table to turn a diamond block into a netherite block, for those who can't find more netherite or are lazy to look for it. Available for fabric/forge/neoforge!
if the mod doesn't work on a certain reason, please DM me on discord (username is on profile).
